Frequently Asked Questions

Nail cap for elastic titanium nail with self-retaining T25 Star drive recess for easy pick-up and insertion

This product is manufactured by CLAVO and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the CLAVO End Caps for Elastic Titanium Nails, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The CLAVO End Caps for Elastic Titanium Nails is constructed using TAV(Ti-6Al-4V), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
